title: Mrudhu Bhave Dhruda Kruthye
overview: Shankar Das, with the help of his friends, escapes from his hometown in Kerala to Mumbai seeking refuge from false persecution in a criminal case. After 16 years, he returns back to solve the issues of drinking water shortage and to unveil the truth of his past.
